name: Notion
description: Notion API access for pages, databases, and search across the workspaces the integration token can see
context:
Notion integration token: stored at ~/.config/notion/api_key (chmod 600), or NOTION_TOKEN env var.
Direct API: curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Notion-Version: 2022-06-28" https://api.notion.com/v1/...
See SKILL.md for workspace setup, search and page-creation patterns, and the optional MCP server option.
